terms.one_liner_eli14: For subscription businesses, the predictable yearly revenue you'd get if everyone kept paying their current plan. The number SaaS investors care about most.
terms.why_it_matters: OpenAI's $25B annualized revenue (Sacra) and MSFT's $37B AI run-rate are the disclosed ARR-class numbers anchoring the AI-revenue-disclosure-rewrite thesis.

eli14.en: For subscription businesses, the predictable yearly revenue you'd get if everyone kept paying their current plan. The number SaaS investors care about most.
eli14.ja: サブスク事業で、現状の契約者全員が同じプランを払い続けた場合に得られる、予測可能な年間売上。SaaS 投資家が最も重視する数字。
eli14.es: Para negocios de suscripción, los ingresos anuales predecibles que tendrías si todos siguieran pagando su plan actual. El número que más importa a los inversores SaaS.
eli14.fil: Para sa subscription businesses, ang predictable yearly revenue kung lahat ay magpapatuloy sa current plan nila. Ang numerong pinakaiintindihan ng SaaS investors.

why.en: OpenAI's $25B annualized revenue (Sacra) and MSFT's $37B AI run-rate are the disclosed ARR-class numbers anchoring the AI-revenue-disclosure-rewrite thesis.
why.ja: OpenAI の年率 250 億ドル売上 (Sacra) と MSFT の AI ラン・レート 370 億ドルが、開示済みの ARR 級数値で、AI 売上開示書き換えテーゼの基準点。
why.es: Los $25B anualizados de ingresos de OpenAI (Sacra) y los $37B de run-rate de IA de MSFT son las cifras tipo ARR divulgadas que anclan la tesis de la reescritura de la divulgación de ingresos de IA.
why.fil: Ang $25B annualized revenue ng OpenAI (Sacra) at $37B AI run-rate ng MSFT ang disclosed ARR-class numbers na nag-aanchor sa AI-revenue-disclosure-rewrite thesis.

terms.one_liner_eli14: A list of all the tricks attackers actually use, organized like a recipe book. Defenders compare their detections against it.
terms.why_it_matters: Standard vocabulary for talking about attacker behavior. Without it, every security vendor invents their own taxonomy.

eli14.en: A list of all the tricks attackers actually use, organized like a recipe book. Defenders compare their detections against it.
eli14.ja: 攻撃者が実際に使う手口の一覧をレシピ帳のように整理したもの。守る側は自分の検知をこれに照らしてチェックする。
eli14.es: Una lista de todos los trucos que los atacantes usan en realidad, organizada como un recetario. Los defensores comparan sus detecciones con ella.
eli14.fil: Listahan ng lahat ng tricks na talagang ginagamit ng mga attacker, nakaayos parang recipe book. Iko-compare ng mga defender ang detections nila dito.

why.en: Standard vocabulary for talking about attacker behavior. Without it, every security vendor invents their own taxonomy.
why.ja: 攻撃者の挙動を語るときの共通語彙。これが無いと、各セキュリティベンダーが独自の分類を作って噛み合わない。
why.es: Vocabulario estándar para hablar del comportamiento de los atacantes. Sin él, cada proveedor de seguridad inventa su propia taxonomía.
why.fil: Standard na bokabularyo para pag-usapan ang attacker behavior. Kung wala ito, magkakanya-kaniyang taxonomy ang bawat security vendor.

terms.one_liner_eli14: The CISA directive that turns the KEV catalog into a hard rule for US federal agencies: if a CVE lands on KEV, you have a fixed number of days to patch it. The teeth behind KEV.
terms.why_it_matters: BOD-22-01 is what turns 'high CVSS' into 'enterprise calendar event' — the May 15 federal deadline on Linux Copy Fail KEV is the single largest install-base 14-day-deadline of 2026.

eli14.en: The CISA directive that turns the KEV catalog into a hard rule for US federal agencies: if a CVE lands on KEV, you have a fixed number of days to patch it. The teeth behind KEV.
eli14.ja: KEV カタログを米連邦機関にとっての強制ルールに変える CISA 指令 — KEV 入りした CVE は決められた日数以内に修正必須。KEV の歯。
eli14.es: La directiva de CISA que convierte el catálogo KEV en una regla firme para las agencias federales de EE. UU.: si un CVE entra en KEV, hay un número fijo de días para parchearlo. Los dientes detrás de KEV.
eli14.fil: Direktiba ng CISA na ginagawang mahigpit na panuntunan ang KEV catalog para sa US federal agencies: pagkasok ng CVE sa KEV, may takdang araw para mai-patch. Ang ngipin ng KEV.

why.en: BOD-22-01 is what turns 'high CVSS' into 'enterprise calendar event' — the May 15 federal deadline on Linux Copy Fail KEV is the single largest install-base 14-day-deadline of 2026.
why.ja: BOD-22-01 こそが「高い CVSS」を「企業カレンダーの予定」に変える機構 — Linux Copy Fail KEV の 5/15 連邦期限は 2026 年最大インストールベースの 14 日期限。
why.es: BOD-22-01 es lo que convierte 'CVSS alto' en 'evento del calendario empresarial' — el plazo federal del 15 de mayo sobre el KEV de Linux Copy Fail es el plazo de 14 días con mayor base instalada de 2026.
why.fil: Ang BOD-22-01 ang nagpapatuloy sa 'mataas na CVSS' patungo sa 'enterprise calendar event' — ang May 15 federal deadline para sa Linux Copy Fail KEV ang pinakamalaking install-base 14-day-deadline ng 2026.

terms.one_liner_eli14: AWS's marketplace for hosted AI models — you call OpenAI, Anthropic, Meta, etc. through one Amazon API instead of each vendor's. The 'every model on every cloud' surface.
terms.why_it_matters: Bedrock + Vertex AI + Microsoft Foundry is the multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization substrate. OpenAI-on-Bedrock (Apr 28) ended the model-portability promise of 2024-2025.

eli14.en: AWS's marketplace for hosted AI models — you call OpenAI, Anthropic, Meta, etc. through one Amazon API instead of each vendor's. The 'every model on every cloud' surface.
eli14.ja: AWS のホスト AI モデルマーケット。OpenAI、Anthropic、Meta などを Amazon の単一 API 経由で呼べる。「すべてのモデルがすべてのクラウドに」を体現する場。
eli14.es: Mercado de AWS para modelos de IA alojados — llamas a OpenAI, Anthropic, Meta, etc. a través de una sola API de Amazon en lugar de la de cada proveedor. La superficie de 'cada modelo en cada nube'.
eli14.fil: Marketplace ng AWS para sa hosted AI models — tumatawag ka sa OpenAI, Anthropic, Meta, atbp. via isang Amazon API kaysa sa bawat vendor. Ang surface ng 'every model on every cloud'.

why.en: Bedrock + Vertex AI + Microsoft Foundry is the multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization substrate. OpenAI-on-Bedrock (Apr 28) ended the model-portability promise of 2024-2025.
why.ja: Bedrock + Vertex AI + Microsoft Foundry がマルチクラウド・フロンティアモデル SLA 標準化の基盤。OpenAI-on-Bedrock (4/28) が 2024-2025 年の「モデル移植性」の約束に決着をつけた。
why.es: Bedrock + Vertex AI + Microsoft Foundry es el sustrato de estandarización de SLA para modelos frontera multinube. OpenAI-on-Bedrock (28 abr) cerró la promesa de portabilidad de modelos de 2024-2025.
why.fil: Ang Bedrock + Vertex AI + Microsoft Foundry ang substrate ng multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization. Ang OpenAI-on-Bedrock (Apr 28) ang nag-tapos sa model-portability promise ng 2024-2025.

terms.one_liner_eli14: An industry group setting rules for how AI agents are kept safe — like a homeowners' association for AI security.
terms.why_it_matters: If CSAI's rules become a CNA-issued standard, agentic AI risk becomes a compliance category, not just a research topic.

eli14.en: An industry group setting rules for how AI agents are kept safe — like a homeowners' association for AI security.
eli14.ja: AI エージェントの安全運用ルールを決める業界団体。AI セキュリティの「町内会」のようなもの。
eli14.es: Un grupo de la industria que establece las reglas para mantener seguros a los agentes de IA — como una asociación de vecinos para la seguridad de IA.
eli14.fil: Industriya group na nagtatakda ng mga panuntunan para safe ang AI agents — parang homeowners' association para sa AI security.

why.en: If CSAI's rules become a CNA-issued standard, agentic AI risk becomes a compliance category, not just a research topic.
why.ja: CSAI のルールが CNA 発行の標準になれば、エージェント AI のリスクは研究テーマからコンプライアンス要件に変わる。
why.es: Si las reglas de CSAI se convierten en un estándar emitido por una CNA, el riesgo de los agentes de IA pasa de tema de investigación a categoría de cumplimiento.
why.fil: Kapag naging CNA-issued standard ang mga rules ng CSAI, magiging compliance category na (hindi lang research topic) ang agentic AI risk.

terms.one_liner_eli14: A unique ID for every known software bug that can be exploited. Lets the world refer to the same problem unambiguously.
terms.why_it_matters: If a bug has no CVE, it's invisible to enterprise patch programs and compliance checks.

eli14.en: A unique ID for every known software bug that can be exploited. Lets the world refer to the same problem unambiguously.
eli14.ja: 悪用可能な既知のソフトウェアバグ 1 つ 1 つに付く一意の ID。世界中で同じ問題を曖昧さなく指し示せる。
eli14.es: Un ID único para cada bug de software conocido que puede ser explotado. Permite que el mundo se refiera al mismo problema sin ambigüedad.
eli14.fil: Natatanging ID para sa bawat kilalang software bug na pwedeng i-exploit. Para ma-refer ng mundo ang parehong problema nang walang ambiguity.

why.en: If a bug has no CVE, it's invisible to enterprise patch programs and compliance checks.
why.ja: CVE が無いバグは企業のパッチ管理プログラムやコンプラチェックから見えなくなる。
why.es: Si un bug no tiene CVE, es invisible para los programas de parches empresariales y los controles de cumplimiento.
why.fil: Kung walang CVE ang bug, hindi ito nakikita ng enterprise patch programs at compliance checks.

terms.one_liner_eli14: A 0-10 score for how bad a software bug is. 9-10 means drop everything and patch.
terms.why_it_matters: Drives the cutoff for what enterprises must patch within how many days. Score >= 8.0 is the spotlight zone.

eli14.en: A 0-10 score for how bad a software bug is. 9-10 means drop everything and patch.
eli14.ja: ソフトウェアバグの危険度を 0-10 で表すスコア。9-10 なら全部止めてパッチ。
eli14.es: Una puntuación de 0 a 10 sobre la gravedad de un bug de software. 9-10 significa dejarlo todo y parchear.
eli14.fil: Score na 0-10 kung gaano kasama ang software bug. Ang 9-10 ay senyas na 'drop everything at i-patch agad'.

why.en: Drives the cutoff for what enterprises must patch within how many days. Score >= 8.0 is the spotlight zone.
why.ja: 企業が「何日以内に何をパッチするか」の境界線を決める基準。スコア 8.0 以上は要対応。
why.es: Define el corte de qué deben parchear las empresas y en cuántos días. Una puntuación >= 8.0 es la zona de atención inmediata.
why.fil: Itinatakda nito ang cutoff kung ano ang dapat i-patch ng enterprises sa loob ng ilang araw. Score >= 8.0 ang spotlight zone.

terms.one_liner_eli14: The US military's procurement and operations command — runs the world's largest classified-network IT estate. AI-procurement decisions ripple from DoD outward to allied governments.
terms.why_it_matters: Pentagon's 8-vendor classified-network list with Anthropic excluded as 'supply chain risk' is the first publicly-disclosed presidential-administration vs frontier-AI-lab autonomous-weapons-use stand-off — and the canonical 2026 procurement-precedent.

eli14.en: The US military's procurement and operations command — runs the world's largest classified-network IT estate. AI-procurement decisions ripple from DoD outward to allied governments.
eli14.ja: 米軍の調達・運用司令部 — 世界最大の機密ネットワーク IT 環境を運営する。AI 調達の決定は DoD から同盟国政府へ波及する。
eli14.es: El mando de adquisiciones y operaciones del ejército estadounidense — opera el mayor patrimonio TI de redes clasificadas del mundo. Las decisiones de adquisición de IA se propagan desde el DoD hacia los gobiernos aliados.
eli14.fil: Procurement at operations command ng US military — pinapatakbo ang pinakamalaking classified-network IT estate sa mundo. Mula sa DoD lumalaganap ang AI-procurement decisions papuntang allied governments.

why.en: Pentagon's 8-vendor classified-network list with Anthropic excluded as 'supply chain risk' is the first publicly-disclosed presidential-administration vs frontier-AI-lab autonomous-weapons-use stand-off — and the canonical 2026 procurement-precedent.
why.ja: 国防総省の 8 社機密ネットワーク調達リストから Anthropic が「サプライチェーンリスク」として除外された件は、公表された大統領府 vs フロンティア AI ラボの自律兵器利用初対決 — 2026 年の調達前例の代表。
why.es: La lista de 8 proveedores de redes clasificadas del Pentágono con Anthropic excluido como 'riesgo de cadena de suministro' es el primer enfrentamiento administración-presidencial vs laboratorio de IA frontera sobre uso de armas autónomas divulgado públicamente — y el precedente canónico de adquisiciones de 2026.
why.fil: Ang 8-vendor classified-network list ng Pentagon kung saan na-exclude ang Anthropic bilang 'supply chain risk' ang first publicly-disclosed presidential-administration vs frontier-AI-lab autonomous-weapons-use stand-off — at ang canonical 2026 procurement-precedent.

terms.one_liner_eli14: The European Union's AI law — categorizes AI systems by risk level and sets rules for each category, with the heaviest rules on biometric ID, education, hiring, and law enforcement.
terms.why_it_matters: EU AI Act compliance phases through 2026-2027 are the operative deadline structure non-EU AI vendors trade against. CSAI / NIST / EU triangulation defines what 'compliant' means in cross-border procurement.

eli14.en: The European Union's AI law — categorizes AI systems by risk level and sets rules for each category, with the heaviest rules on biometric ID, education, hiring, and law enforcement.
eli14.ja: 欧州連合の AI 法 — AI システムをリスクレベルで分類し、カテゴリごとにルールを定める。最も重い規制は生体認証 ID、教育、採用、法執行に課される。
eli14.es: La ley de IA de la Unión Europea — clasifica los sistemas de IA por nivel de riesgo y fija reglas para cada categoría, con las normas más estrictas en identificación biométrica, educación, contratación y aplicación de la ley.
eli14.fil: Batas ng European Union sa AI — kine-classify ang AI systems ayon sa risk level at nagtatakda ng rules per category, pinakamabigat sa biometric ID, education, hiring, at law enforcement.

why.en: EU AI Act compliance phases through 2026-2027 are the operative deadline structure non-EU AI vendors trade against. CSAI / NIST / EU triangulation defines what 'compliant' means in cross-border procurement.
why.ja: 2026-2027 年に段階適用される EU AI Act が、EU 域外 AI ベンダーにとっての運用上の期限構造。CSAI / NIST / EU の三角測量が国境横断調達における「適合」の定義を決める。
why.es: Las fases de cumplimiento de la EU AI Act durante 2026-2027 son la estructura de plazos operativa contra la que los proveedores de IA no UE negocian. La triangulación CSAI / NIST / UE define qué significa 'cumplir' en compras transfronterizas.
why.fil: Ang compliance phases ng EU AI Act sa 2026-2027 ang operative deadline structure na pinagba-base ng non-EU AI vendors. Ang CSAI / NIST / EU triangulation ang nagde-define kung ano ang 'compliant' sa cross-border procurement.

terms.one_liner_eli14: The committee inside the US Federal Reserve that decides interest rates. When they raise rates, borrowing gets more expensive everywhere.
terms.why_it_matters: FOMC posture sets the discount rate every AI-capex story is priced against. Powell-staying-on-Board reshapes 2026 monetary-policy market psychology.

eli14.en: The committee inside the US Federal Reserve that decides interest rates. When they raise rates, borrowing gets more expensive everywhere.
eli14.ja: 米連邦準備制度の委員会で、政策金利を決める。金利を上げれば、世界中で借入コストが上昇する。
eli14.es: El comité dentro de la Reserva Federal de EE. UU. que decide los tipos de interés. Cuando suben los tipos, los préstamos se encarecen en todas partes.
eli14.fil: Komiteng nasa loob ng US Federal Reserve na nagdedesisyon sa interest rates. Pag itinaas nila ang rates, mas mahal ang paghiram saan man.

why.en: FOMC posture sets the discount rate every AI-capex story is priced against. Powell-staying-on-Board reshapes 2026 monetary-policy market psychology.
why.ja: FOMC の姿勢が、すべての AI capex ストーリーの割引率の前提になる。Powell の理事残留が 2026 年の金融政策市場心理を再構築している。
why.es: La postura del FOMC fija el tipo de descuento contra el que se valoran todas las historias de capex de IA. Que Powell siga en la Junta reconfigura la psicología de mercado de política monetaria de 2026.
why.fil: Ang posture ng FOMC ang nagse-set sa discount rate na pinagba-base sa AI-capex stories. Ang pananatili ni Powell sa Board ang bumabago sa 2026 monetary-policy market psychology.

terms.one_liner_eli14: Microsoft's umbrella for AI-app building blocks — model serving, agent runtime, observability. Foundry Local is the on-device variant that ships with Windows.
terms.why_it_matters: Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Foundry Local form the Microsoft side of the agent-control-plane thesis. Counterpart to AWS Bedrock AgentCore on the cloud side.

eli14.en: Microsoft's umbrella for AI-app building blocks — model serving, agent runtime, observability. Foundry Local is the on-device variant that ships with Windows.
eli14.ja: AI アプリ構築のための Microsoft の総合ブランド — モデル配信、エージェントランタイム、可観測性を束ねる。Foundry Local は Windows 同梱のオンデバイス版。
eli14.es: Paraguas de Microsoft para los bloques de construcción de aplicaciones de IA — serving de modelos, runtime de agentes, observabilidad. Foundry Local es la variante on-device que viene con Windows.
eli14.fil: Umbrella ng Microsoft para sa AI-app building blocks — model serving, agent runtime, observability. Ang Foundry Local ang on-device variant na kasama sa Windows.

why.en: Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Foundry Local form the Microsoft side of the agent-control-plane thesis. Counterpart to AWS Bedrock AgentCore on the cloud side.
why.ja: Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA と Foundry Local は、エージェント制御プレーンテーゼの Microsoft 側を構成する。クラウド側の AWS Bedrock AgentCore に対応する位置づけ。
why.es: Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Foundry Local conforman el lado Microsoft de la tesis del plano de control de agentes. Contrapartida del AWS Bedrock AgentCore en el lado cloud.
why.fil: Ang Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Foundry Local ang Microsoft side ng agent-control-plane thesis. Counterpart ng AWS Bedrock AgentCore sa cloud side.

terms.one_liner_eli14: A chip originally built for video graphics that turned out to be perfect for the math behind AI — thousands of small calculations in parallel. Currently the bottleneck for training and inference.
terms.why_it_matters: GPU supply (especially NVIDIA H/B-series + AMD MI400) gates the entire AI-capex story. AMD's OpenAI 6GW first-deployment H2 2026 is the sharpest single read on chip-availability timing.

eli14.en: A chip originally built for video graphics that turned out to be perfect for the math behind AI — thousands of small calculations in parallel. Currently the bottleneck for training and inference.
eli14.ja: もともと映像描画用に作られたチップで、AI の数学処理 (大量の小計算を並列実行) に最適だと判明したもの。現状、訓練と推論のボトルネック。
eli14.es: Un chip originalmente creado para gráficos de vídeo que resultó perfecto para la matemática detrás de la IA — miles de pequeños cálculos en paralelo. Actualmente el cuello de botella para entrenamiento e inferencia.
eli14.fil: Chip na orihinal na ginawa para sa video graphics na napag-alamang perfect para sa math sa likod ng AI — libu-libong maliliit na calculation parallel. Sa ngayon, ito ang bottleneck para sa training at inference.

why.en: GPU supply (especially NVIDIA H/B-series + AMD MI400) gates the entire AI-capex story. AMD's OpenAI 6GW first-deployment H2 2026 is the sharpest single read on chip-availability timing.
why.ja: GPU 供給 (特に NVIDIA H/B シリーズと AMD MI400) が AI capex ストーリー全体の門番。AMD の OpenAI 6GW H2 2026 初配備は、チップ供給タイミングを最も鋭く読める指標。
why.es: El suministro de GPUs (especialmente NVIDIA H/B-series + AMD MI400) limita toda la historia de capex de IA. El primer despliegue de 6GW para OpenAI de AMD en H2 2026 es la lectura más nítida del timing de disponibilidad de chips.
why.fil: Ang GPU supply (lalo na ang NVIDIA H/B-series + AMD MI400) ang gate ng buong AI-capex story. Ang AMD OpenAI 6GW first-deployment H2 2026 ang pinaka-malinaw na single read sa chip-availability timing.

terms.one_liner_eli14: An agent harness with a self-learned skills layer at its core — emphasizes 'depth of learning' over OpenClaw's 'breadth of integration.' Skills accumulate across runs instead of starting from scratch.
terms.why_it_matters: Hermes operationalizes the User Prediction 3 thesis (RL-trained agents that improve via feedback). The 'breadth vs depth' axis — OpenClaw vs Hermes — is the operative design choice for 2026 agent procurement.

eli14.en: An agent harness with a self-learned skills layer at its core — emphasizes 'depth of learning' over OpenClaw's 'breadth of integration.' Skills accumulate across runs instead of starting from scratch.
eli14.ja: 中核に自己学習スキル層を持つエージェントハーネス — OpenClaw の「統合幅」に対し「学習深度」を重視する設計。スキルは毎回ゼロから始めるのではなく、実行を跨いで蓄積される。
eli14.es: Un harness de agente con una capa de skills aprendidas por sí mismas en su núcleo — enfatiza 'profundidad de aprendizaje' frente a la 'amplitud de integración' de OpenClaw. Las skills se acumulan a través de ejecuciones en vez de empezar desde cero.
eli14.fil: Agent harness na may self-learned skills layer sa core — binibigyang-diin ang 'depth of learning' sa halip na 'breadth of integration' ng OpenClaw. Naka-aaccumulate ang skills sa kabuuan ng runs, hindi nagsisimulang muli sa simula.

why.en: Hermes operationalizes the User Prediction 3 thesis (RL-trained agents that improve via feedback). The 'breadth vs depth' axis — OpenClaw vs Hermes — is the operative design choice for 2026 agent procurement.
why.ja: Hermes は User Prediction 3 (フィードバックで成長する RL 訓練エージェント) を運用形に落とす存在。「統合幅 vs 学習深度」軸 — OpenClaw vs Hermes — は 2026 年のエージェント調達における運用上の設計選択。
why.es: Hermes operativiza la tesis de la User Prediction 3 (agentes entrenados por RL que mejoran vía feedback). El eje 'amplitud vs profundidad' — OpenClaw vs Hermes — es la elección de diseño operativa para la adquisición de agentes de 2026.
why.fil: Ino-operationalize ng Hermes ang thesis ng User Prediction 3 (RL-trained agents na umuunlad sa feedback). Ang 'breadth vs depth' axis — OpenClaw vs Hermes — ang operative design choice para sa 2026 agent procurement.

terms.one_liner_eli14: Memory the AI keeps for the words you've already said in the conversation, so it doesn't have to re-read them.
terms.why_it_matters: KV-cache size and reuse drive most of the cost and latency in serving long-context LLMs.

eli14.en: Memory the AI keeps for the words you've already said in the conversation, so it doesn't have to re-read them.
eli14.ja: AI が会話の中で既に話した単語を覚えておくメモリ。毎回読み直さなくて済むようにするため。
eli14.es: Memoria que la IA conserva de las palabras que ya has dicho, para no tener que releerlas.
eli14.fil: Memory na pinananatili ng AI para sa mga salitang nasabi mo na, para di na kailangan basahing muli.

why.en: KV-cache size and reuse drive most of the cost and latency in serving long-context LLMs.
why.ja: 長い文脈の LLM を動かすコストとレイテンシのほとんどは、KV-cache のサイズと再利用に支配される。
why.es: El tamaño y la reutilización del KV-cache dominan la mayor parte del coste y la latencia al servir LLMs con contexto largo.
why.fil: Pinangungunahan ng laki at reuse ng KV-cache ang karamihan ng cost at latency sa pag-serve ng long-context LLMs.

terms.one_liner_eli14: A shared way for AI assistants to talk to outside tools (files, search, GitHub). Like USB for AI.
terms.why_it_matters: If MCP wins, agents become portable across vendors. Otherwise we're stuck with vendor-specific glue.

eli14.en: A shared way for AI assistants to talk to outside tools (files, search, GitHub). Like USB for AI.
eli14.ja: AIアシスタントが外部のツール (ファイル、検索、GitHub) と話すための共通の仕組み。AI 用の USB のようなもの。
eli14.es: Una forma común de que los asistentes de IA hablen con herramientas externas (archivos, búsqueda, GitHub). Es como un USB para IA.
eli14.fil: Karaniwang paraan para makapag-usap ang mga AI assistant sa mga external na tool (files, search, GitHub). Parang USB para sa AI.

why.en: If MCP wins, agents become portable across vendors. Otherwise we're stuck with vendor-specific glue.
why.ja: MCP が普及すれば、エージェントはベンダー横断で動かしやすくなる。普及しなければ、ベンダー固有の繋ぎ込みに縛られる。
why.es: Si MCP se impone, los agentes serán portables entre proveedores. Si no, seguiremos atados a integraciones específicas de cada proveedor.
why.fil: Kung manalo ang MCP, magiging portable ang mga agent sa iba't ibang vendor. Kung hindi, mako-lock-in tayo sa vendor-specific glue code.

terms.one_liner_eli14: An organization MITRE has trusted to assign CVE IDs. Like a city issuing license plates for software bugs.
terms.why_it_matters: Once a vendor or domain (e.g. AI agents) has its own CNA, vulnerabilities get tracked formally — that gates enterprise risk transfer.

eli14.en: An organization MITRE has trusted to assign CVE IDs. Like a city issuing license plates for software bugs.
eli14.ja: MITRE が CVE ID の発行を任せている組織。市が車のナンバープレートを発行するように、ソフトウェアのバグに ID を発行する役割。
eli14.es: Una organización en la que MITRE confía para asignar IDs CVE. Como una ciudad que emite matrículas para los bugs de software.
eli14.fil: Organisasyon na pinagkakatiwalaan ng MITRE para mag-issue ng CVE ID. Parang siyudad na nag-i-issue ng license plate para sa mga software bug.

why.en: Once a vendor or domain (e.g. AI agents) has its own CNA, vulnerabilities get tracked formally — that gates enterprise risk transfer.
why.ja: ベンダーや領域 (例: AI エージェント) が自分の CNA を持つと、脆弱性が正式に追跡される — 企業のリスク移転の前提になる。
why.es: Cuando un proveedor o dominio (p. ej. agentes de IA) tiene su propio CNA, las vulnerabilidades se rastrean formalmente — base para la transferencia de riesgo empresarial.
why.fil: Kapag may sariling CNA ang isang vendor o domain (hal. AI agents), pormal na nasusubaybayan ang mga vulnerability — pundasyon ng enterprise risk transfer.

terms.one_liner_eli14: Wall Street nickname for the seven mega-cap tech stocks (Apple, Microsoft, Alphabet, Amazon, Meta, NVIDIA, Tesla) that have outsized weight in market indexes.
terms.why_it_matters: Their quarterly capex, AI-revenue disclosures, and buyback patterns drive the AI-infrastructure narrative end to end.

eli14.en: Wall Street nickname for the seven mega-cap tech stocks (Apple, Microsoft, Alphabet, Amazon, Meta, NVIDIA, Tesla) that have outsized weight in market indexes.
eli14.ja: ウォール街での呼称。市場指数に過大な比重を持つ大手テック 7 社 (Apple、Microsoft、Alphabet、Amazon、Meta、NVIDIA、Tesla) の総称。
eli14.es: Apodo de Wall Street para las siete megacapitalizadas tecnológicas (Apple, Microsoft, Alphabet, Amazon, Meta, NVIDIA, Tesla) con peso desproporcionado en los índices.
eli14.fil: Wall Street nickname para sa pitong mega-cap tech stocks (Apple, Microsoft, Alphabet, Amazon, Meta, NVIDIA, Tesla) na sobrang laki ng weight sa market indexes.

why.en: Their quarterly capex, AI-revenue disclosures, and buyback patterns drive the AI-infrastructure narrative end to end.
why.ja: 彼らの四半期 capex、AI 売上の開示、自社株買いの動向が AI インフラの物語全体を動かす。
why.es: Su capex trimestral, la divulgación de ingresos de IA y los patrones de recompra impulsan toda la narrativa de la infraestructura de IA.
why.fil: Ang quarterly capex, AI-revenue disclosures, at buyback patterns nila ang nagtutulak sa buong AI infrastructure narrative.

terms.one_liner_eli14: An open-source vendor-neutral self-hosted orchestrator for running multiple LLM profiles — different models, settings, and routes — from one place. The reference 'multi-profiling' tool for local LLMs.
terms.why_it_matters: Multi-profiling matters when User Prediction 2's 'cloud APIs for advanced + local LLMs for daily' split goes mainstream — Multica is the canonical open-source orchestrator pattern that split runs through. Project flag: news-driven coverage only.

eli14.en: An open-source vendor-neutral self-hosted orchestrator for running multiple LLM profiles — different models, settings, and routes — from one place. The reference 'multi-profiling' tool for local LLMs.
eli14.ja: ベンダ中立・自前ホスト型のオープンソース・オーケストレータで、複数の LLM プロファイル (モデル・設定・経路) を一箇所から運用するためのもの。ローカル LLM 向け「マルチプロファイリング」の標準実装。
eli14.es: Un orquestador de código abierto, neutral en proveedores y autoalojado para ejecutar múltiples perfiles de LLM — diferentes modelos, ajustes y rutas — desde un solo lugar. La herramienta de referencia de 'multi-profiling' para LLMs locales.
eli14.fil: Open-source, vendor-neutral, self-hosted orchestrator para mag-run ng multiple LLM profiles — iba't ibang models, settings, at routes — mula sa iisang lugar. Reference na 'multi-profiling' tool para sa local LLMs.

why.en: Multi-profiling matters when User Prediction 2's 'cloud APIs for advanced + local LLMs for daily' split goes mainstream — Multica is the canonical open-source orchestrator pattern that split runs through. Project flag: news-driven coverage only.
why.ja: User Prediction 2 の「高度処理はクラウド API、日常はローカル LLM」分業が主流化する際、マルチプロファイリングが意味を持つ。Multica はその分業を実装する代表的なオープンソース・オーケストレータ。プロジェクト規定はニュース駆動カバーのみ。
why.es: El multi-profiling importa cuando la división 'APIs cloud para avanzado + LLMs locales para diario' de la User Prediction 2 se vuelve mainstream — Multica es el patrón canónico de orquestador de código abierto a través del cual se ejecuta esa división. Marca del proyecto: cobertura solo guiada por noticias.
why.fil: Mahalaga ang multi-profiling pagdating ng split ng User Prediction 2 ('cloud APIs for advanced + local LLMs for daily') sa mainstream — Multica ang canonical open-source orchestrator pattern para sa split na yan. Project flag: news-driven coverage lang.

terms.one_liner_eli14: NIST's playbook for managing AI system risk — voluntary, but it's the document US federal agencies and many enterprises align procurement and audits to.
terms.why_it_matters: NIST AI RMF + EU AI Act + ISO/IEC 42001 are the three reference frames CSAI's STAR for AI Catastrophic Risk Annex aligns to — the regulatory triad agentic-AI compliance ends up triangulating against.

eli14.en: NIST's playbook for managing AI system risk — voluntary, but it's the document US federal agencies and many enterprises align procurement and audits to.
eli14.ja: AI システムリスク管理に関する NIST のプレイブック — 任意だが、米連邦機関と多くの企業が調達と監査を整合させる文書。
eli14.es: El manual de NIST para gestionar el riesgo de los sistemas de IA — voluntario, pero es el documento al que las agencias federales de EE. UU. y muchas empresas alinean adquisiciones y auditorías.
eli14.fil: Playbook ng NIST para sa pag-manage ng AI system risk — voluntary, pero ito ang dokumentong sinusunod ng US federal agencies at maraming enterprises sa procurement at audits.

why.en: NIST AI RMF + EU AI Act + ISO/IEC 42001 are the three reference frames CSAI's STAR for AI Catastrophic Risk Annex aligns to — the regulatory triad agentic-AI compliance ends up triangulating against.
why.ja: NIST AI RMF + EU AI Act + ISO/IEC 42001 が CSAI STAR for AI Catastrophic Risk Annex の参照する三つの枠組み — エージェント AI のコンプライアンスが結局は三角測量する規制トライアド。
why.es: NIST AI RMF + EU AI Act + ISO/IEC 42001 son los tres marcos de referencia con los que se alinea el Annex STAR for AI Catastrophic Risk de CSAI — la tríada regulatoria contra la que la conformidad de IA agéntica acaba triangulando.
why.fil: Ang NIST AI RMF + EU AI Act + ISO/IEC 42001 ang tatlong reference frames na inaayon ng CSAI STAR for AI Catastrophic Risk Annex — ang regulatory triad na kinikilala ng agentic-AI compliance.

terms.one_liner_eli14: NVIDIA's enterprise-wrapped version of OpenClaw — adds audit logging, access control, and guardrails on top, plus NIM-based GPU-locked configuration. Announced at GTC 2026.
terms.why_it_matters: NemoClaw normalizes OpenClaw's ecosystem for enterprise procurement. The 'breadth-with-guardrails' configuration the agent-control-plane thesis predicts becomes default in regulated buyers.

eli14.en: NVIDIA's enterprise-wrapped version of OpenClaw — adds audit logging, access control, and guardrails on top, plus NIM-based GPU-locked configuration. Announced at GTC 2026.
eli14.ja: NVIDIA が OpenClaw を企業向けにラップした版 — 監査ログ、アクセス制御、ガードレールを追加し、NIM ベースの GPU 専有構成を持つ。GTC 2026 で発表。
eli14.es: La versión de OpenClaw envuelta para empresas por NVIDIA — añade registro de auditoría, control de acceso y guardrails encima, más configuración GPU bloqueada basada en NIM. Anunciada en GTC 2026.
eli14.fil: Enterprise-wrapped na bersyon ng OpenClaw ng NVIDIA — nagdagdag ng audit logging, access control, at guardrails, plus NIM-based GPU-locked configuration. Inanunsyo sa GTC 2026.

why.en: NemoClaw normalizes OpenClaw's ecosystem for enterprise procurement. The 'breadth-with-guardrails' configuration the agent-control-plane thesis predicts becomes default in regulated buyers.
why.ja: NemoClaw は OpenClaw のエコシステムを企業調達向けに整合させる。エージェント制御プレーンテーゼが予測する「ガードレール付き統合幅」構成が、規制対象バイヤーの既定値になる経路。
why.es: NemoClaw normaliza el ecosistema OpenClaw para la compra empresarial. La configuración 'amplitud con guardrails' que la tesis del plano de control de agentes predice se vuelve por defecto en compradores regulados.
why.fil: Pinapatatag ng NemoClaw ang ecosystem ng OpenClaw para sa enterprise procurement. Ang 'breadth-with-guardrails' configuration na hinuhulaan ng agent-control-plane thesis ay nagiging default sa regulated buyers.

terms.one_liner_eli14: An open-source AI agent harness — the scaffold around an LLM that runs tools, manages memory, and handles plans. Treats every problem as new (no built-in skill-learning layer). 346K+ GitHub stars.
terms.why_it_matters: OpenClaw is the breadth-of-integration reference point in the Agent Harness topic — Claude Code + GitHub Copilot CLI + ollama launch all hook into it. Microsoft Agent 365 names it as a local-agent integration path.

eli14.en: An open-source AI agent harness — the scaffold around an LLM that runs tools, manages memory, and handles plans. Treats every problem as new (no built-in skill-learning layer). 346K+ GitHub stars.
eli14.ja: オープンソースの AI エージェントハーネス — LLM の周りでツール実行・メモリ管理・計画処理を担う足場。問題を毎回ゼロから扱う方針 (スキル学習層は持たない)。GitHub スター 34.6 万超。
eli14.es: Un harness de agente IA de código abierto — el armazón alrededor de un LLM que ejecuta herramientas, gestiona memoria y planes. Trata cada problema como nuevo (sin capa de aprendizaje de skills). 346K+ stars en GitHub.
eli14.fil: Open-source AI agent harness — ang scaffold sa paligid ng LLM na nag-rurun ng tools, nag-mamanage ng memory, at humahawak ng plans. Tinuturing na bago ang bawat problema (walang built-in na skill-learning layer). 346K+ stars sa GitHub.

why.en: OpenClaw is the breadth-of-integration reference point in the Agent Harness topic — Claude Code + GitHub Copilot CLI + ollama launch all hook into it. Microsoft Agent 365 names it as a local-agent integration path.
why.ja: OpenClaw は Agent Harness トピックにおける「統合幅」の基準点 — Claude Code + GitHub Copilot CLI + ollama launch がいずれも統合する先。Microsoft Agent 365 はローカルエージェント統合経路として名指しする。
why.es: OpenClaw es el punto de referencia de 'amplitud de integración' en el tema Agent Harness — Claude Code + GitHub Copilot CLI + ollama launch se conectan a él. Microsoft Agent 365 lo nombra como vía de integración de agentes locales.
why.fil: Ang OpenClaw ang breadth-of-integration reference point sa Agent Harness topic — Claude Code + GitHub Copilot CLI + ollama launch ay nag-a-attach dito. Pinapangalanan ito ng Microsoft Agent 365 bilang local-agent integration path.

terms.one_liner_eli14: AI that lives in physical machines — humanoid robots, factory arms, autonomous construction robots. Tesla Optimus, Apptronik Apollo, Figure 03, and Atlas are the marquee 2026 examples.
terms.why_it_matters: Physical AI is the cycle's first hyperscaler-style physical-AI capex commitment surface — Tesla Optimus 1M-units/year nameplate at Fremont and SoftBank Roze AI datacenter-construction robots are the structural markers.

eli14.en: AI that lives in physical machines — humanoid robots, factory arms, autonomous construction robots. Tesla Optimus, Apptronik Apollo, Figure 03, and Atlas are the marquee 2026 examples.
eli14.ja: 物理的な機械に宿る AI — ヒューマノイドロボット、工場アーム、自律建設ロボットなど。2026 年の代表例は Tesla Optimus、Apptronik Apollo、Figure 03、Atlas。
eli14.es: IA que vive en máquinas físicas — robots humanoides, brazos de fábrica, robots de construcción autónomos. Tesla Optimus, Apptronik Apollo, Figure 03 y Atlas son los ejemplos estelares de 2026.
eli14.fil: AI na nakatira sa pisikal na mga makina — humanoid robots, factory arms, autonomous construction robots. Tesla Optimus, Apptronik Apollo, Figure 03, at Atlas ang marquee examples ng 2026.

why.en: Physical AI is the cycle's first hyperscaler-style physical-AI capex commitment surface — Tesla Optimus 1M-units/year nameplate at Fremont and SoftBank Roze AI datacenter-construction robots are the structural markers.
why.ja: Physical AI は今期、ハイパースケーラ型の物理 AI 設備投資コミットが初めて可視化された面 — Tesla Optimus の Fremont 100 万台/年スレートと SoftBank Roze AI のデータセンター建設ロボットが構造的マーカー。
why.es: Physical AI es la primera superficie del ciclo con compromisos de capex de IA física estilo hyperscaler — la placa de 1M unidades/año de Tesla Optimus en Fremont y los robots de construcción de centros de datos de SoftBank Roze AI son los marcadores estructurales.
why.fil: Ang Physical AI ang first surface ng cycle para sa hyperscaler-style physical-AI capex commitment — ang 1M-units/year nameplate ng Tesla Optimus sa Fremont at ang datacenter-construction robots ng SoftBank Roze AI ang structural markers.

terms.one_liner_eli14: An ingredients list for software — every library, version, and dependency it uses. Lets you ask 'is the bad component anywhere in our stack?' in seconds, not weeks.
terms.why_it_matters: SBOM-style provenance is the substrate every CNA-issued AI-agent compliance regime ends up requiring. Without it, agentic-AI risk transfer is impossible at enterprise scale.

eli14.en: An ingredients list for software — every library, version, and dependency it uses. Lets you ask 'is the bad component anywhere in our stack?' in seconds, not weeks.
eli14.ja: ソフトウェアの「成分表」— 使われているすべてのライブラリ・バージョン・依存関係を列挙したもの。「あの脆弱な部品はうちのスタックのどこに入っている?」を週単位ではなく秒単位で答えられる。
eli14.es: Una lista de ingredientes del software — cada biblioteca, versión y dependencia que usa. Permite preguntar '¿está el componente malo en algún lugar de nuestra pila?' en segundos, no semanas.
eli14.fil: Listahan ng sangkap ng software — bawat library, version, at dependency na gamit nito. Nagbibigay-daan na itanong ang 'nasaan kaya sa stack natin yung masamang component?' sa loob ng segundo, hindi linggo.

why.en: SBOM-style provenance is the substrate every CNA-issued AI-agent compliance regime ends up requiring. Without it, agentic-AI risk transfer is impossible at enterprise scale.
why.ja: SBOM 型の出所追跡は、CNA 発行の AI エージェント・コンプライアンス体制が結局必ず要求する基盤。これが無いと、エージェント AI のリスク移転は企業規模では成立しない。
why.es: La trazabilidad estilo SBOM es el sustrato que todo régimen de cumplimiento para agentes de IA emitido por una CNA termina exigiendo. Sin él, la transferencia de riesgo de IA agéntica es imposible a escala empresarial.
why.fil: Ang SBOM-style provenance ang substrate na hinihingi sa huli ng bawat CNA-issued AI-agent compliance regime. Kung wala ito, imposibleng ma-transfer sa enterprise scale ang agentic-AI risk.

terms.one_liner_eli14: Another open-source inference server, sibling to vLLM, focused on structured generation and high-throughput serving. Source of multiple high-severity 2026 CVEs.
terms.why_it_matters: SGLang CVE-2026-5760 unpatched into May 3 was the longest-running 2026 LLM-tooling CVE — exemplar of the inference-server CVE-class thesis.

eli14.en: Another open-source inference server, sibling to vLLM, focused on structured generation and high-throughput serving. Source of multiple high-severity 2026 CVEs.
eli14.ja: vLLM の同系統オープンソース推論サーバー。構造化生成と高スループット配信に注力。2026 年の複数の高深刻度 CVE の発生源。
eli14.es: Otro servidor de inferencia de código abierto, hermano de vLLM, enfocado en generación estructurada y servicio de alto rendimiento. Origen de varios CVE de alta severidad en 2026.
eli14.fil: Isa pang open-source inference server, kapatid ng vLLM, naka-focus sa structured generation at high-throughput serving. Pinanggagalingan ng ilang high-severity 2026 CVE.

why.en: SGLang CVE-2026-5760 unpatched into May 3 was the longest-running 2026 LLM-tooling CVE — exemplar of the inference-server CVE-class thesis.
why.ja: SGLang CVE-2026-5760 が 5/3 まで未修正だったのは 2026 年最長の LLM ツール系 CVE — 推論サーバー CVE クラステーゼの代表例。
why.es: El CVE-2026-5760 de SGLang sin parchear hasta el 3 de mayo fue el CVE de herramienta LLM más duradero de 2026 — ejemplar de la tesis de la clase CVE de servidor de inferencia.
why.fil: Ang SGLang CVE-2026-5760 na unpatched hanggang May 3 ang pinakamatagal na 2026 LLM-tooling CVE — exemplar ng inference-server CVE-class thesis.

terms.one_liner_eli14: A written promise about how often a service will be available and how fast it will respond.
terms.why_it_matters: Determines how much an AI vendor pays you back when their service fails. The teeth behind every cloud contract.

eli14.en: A written promise about how often a service will be available and how fast it will respond.
eli14.ja: サービスがどのくらい使えて、どのくらい速く応えるかについての書面の約束。
eli14.es: Una promesa escrita sobre con qué frecuencia estará disponible un servicio y con qué rapidez responderá.
eli14.fil: Nakasulat na promise tungkol sa kung gaano kadalas ma-aavailable ang isang service at kung gaano kabilis sumagot.

why.en: Determines how much an AI vendor pays you back when their service fails. The teeth behind every cloud contract.
why.ja: AI ベンダーがサービスを止めたときに払う返金額を決める。すべてのクラウド契約の歯がここに集まる。
why.es: Determina cuánto te devuelve un proveedor de IA cuando falla su servicio. Es el 'diente' detrás de cada contrato cloud.
why.fil: Tinutukoy nito kung magkano ang ibabalik ng AI vendor pag pumalpak ang service nila. Ito ang ngipin sa likod ng bawat cloud contract.

terms.one_liner_eli14: A bug class where user input gets concatenated into a database query, letting an attacker rewrite the query and steal or modify data. The web's oldest never-fully-fixed bug class.
terms.why_it_matters: LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (CVSS 9.3) is pre-auth SQLi against the Authorization header — one row leaks OpenAI org keys + Anthropic admin tokens + AWS Bedrock IAM. Single AI-stack SQLi = pan-vendor blast radius.

eli14.en: A bug class where user input gets concatenated into a database query, letting an attacker rewrite the query and steal or modify data. The web's oldest never-fully-fixed bug class.
eli14.ja: ユーザー入力がそのまま DB クエリに連結され、攻撃者がクエリを書き換えてデータを盗んだり改変したりできるバグの種類。Web で最も古く、未だに完全に消えないバグ種類。
eli14.es: Una clase de bug en la que la entrada del usuario se concatena en una consulta de base de datos, permitiendo al atacante reescribir la consulta y robar o modificar datos. La clase de bug más antigua de la web nunca del todo arreglada.
eli14.fil: Klase ng bug kung saan dinurugtong ang user input sa database query, kaya kayang i-rewrite ng attacker ang query at magnakaw o magbago ng data. Pinakamatandang web bug class na hindi pa fully naayos.

why.en: LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (CVSS 9.3) is pre-auth SQLi against the Authorization header — one row leaks OpenAI org keys + Anthropic admin tokens + AWS Bedrock IAM. Single AI-stack SQLi = pan-vendor blast radius.
why.ja: LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (CVSS 9.3) は Authorization ヘッダに対する事前認証 SQLi — 1 行で OpenAI 組織キー + Anthropic 管理トークン + AWS Bedrock IAM が漏れる。AI スタックの単一 SQLi = 全ベンダー横断の被害範囲。
why.es: El CVE-2026-42208 de LiteLLM (CVSS 9.3) es un SQLi preautenticación contra la cabecera Authorization — una sola fila filtra claves de organización de OpenAI + tokens admin de Anthropic + IAM de AWS Bedrock. Un único SQLi en la pila de IA = radio de impacto multi-proveedor.
why.fil: Ang LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (CVSS 9.3) ay pre-auth SQLi laban sa Authorization header — isang row lang, leaked na ang OpenAI org keys + Anthropic admin tokens + AWS Bedrock IAM. Single AI-stack SQLi = pan-vendor blast radius.

terms.one_liner_eli14: A bug class where user input gets evaluated as code by a server-side template engine — so 'hello' isn't shown as text, it gets executed. The bridge from web bug to RCE.
terms.why_it_matters: Inference-server SSTI (LiteLLM, vLLM, SGLang) is the named 2026 attack pattern: model-tooling-layer template injection bridging from prompt path into RCE / token theft.

eli14.en: A bug class where user input gets evaluated as code by a server-side template engine — so 'hello' isn't shown as text, it gets executed. The bridge from web bug to RCE.
eli14.ja: ユーザー入力がサーバ側テンプレートエンジンによってコードとして評価されてしまうバグの種類 — 入力が文字列ではなくコードとして実行される。Web バグから RCE への橋渡し。
eli14.es: Una clase de bug en la que la entrada del usuario se evalúa como código por un motor de plantillas del lado del servidor — así 'hello' no se muestra como texto, se ejecuta. El puente del bug web al RCE.
eli14.fil: Klase ng bug kung saan ang user input ay ina-evaluate bilang code ng server-side template engine — kaya hindi text na 'hello' ang lumalabas, ie-execute ito. Tulay mula sa web bug papunta sa RCE.

why.en: Inference-server SSTI (LiteLLM, vLLM, SGLang) is the named 2026 attack pattern: model-tooling-layer template injection bridging from prompt path into RCE / token theft.
why.ja: 推論サーバの SSTI (LiteLLM、vLLM、SGLang) こそが 2026 年に名前のついた攻撃パターン — モデルツール層のテンプレートインジェクションがプロンプト経路から RCE / トークン窃取へ橋渡しする。
why.es: El SSTI en servidores de inferencia (LiteLLM, vLLM, SGLang) es el patrón de ataque nombrado de 2026: inyección de plantilla en la capa de herramientas del modelo, puente desde la ruta de prompt hasta RCE / robo de tokens.
why.fil: Ang inference-server SSTI (LiteLLM, vLLM, SGLang) ang pinangalanang 2026 attack pattern: template injection sa model-tooling-layer, tulay mula prompt path papuntang RCE / token theft.

terms.one_liner_eli14: A way to shrink an AI model so it runs on tiny hardware while keeping most of its smarts.
terms.why_it_matters: The latest in a long line of quantization tricks. If it sticks, more inference moves to local devices and less to cloud.

eli14.en: A way to shrink an AI model so it runs on tiny hardware while keeping most of its smarts.
eli14.ja: AI モデルを小さくして、スマホや小さな PC でもそれなりに賢く動くようにする方法。
eli14.es: Una forma de encoger un modelo de IA para que corra en hardware pequeño manteniendo casi toda su inteligencia.
eli14.fil: Paraan para liitan ang AI model para tumakbo sa maliit na hardware habang panatilihin ang halos buong galing.

why.en: The latest in a long line of quantization tricks. If it sticks, more inference moves to local devices and less to cloud.
why.ja: 量子化の系譜のひとつ。定着すれば、推論はクラウドからローカルデバイスへ徐々に移る。
why.es: La última de una larga línea de trucos de cuantización. Si cuaja, más inferencia se mueve a dispositivos locales y menos a la nube.
why.fil: Pinakabago sa mahabang linya ng quantization tricks. Kung mag-stick, mas marami sa inference ang lilipat sa local devices, kaysa sa cloud.

terms.one_liner_eli14: An open-source library that makes fine-tuning LLMs much faster and cheaper, especially on a single GPU. The default fine-tuning toolkit for the local-LLM crowd.
terms.why_it_matters: Unsloth is a constant-coverage daily-update topic — its release cadence is the operative pulse of the local-LLM-for-daily-use leg of User Prediction 2.

eli14.en: An open-source library that makes fine-tuning LLMs much faster and cheaper, especially on a single GPU. The default fine-tuning toolkit for the local-LLM crowd.
eli14.ja: LLM のファインチューニングを (特に単一 GPU 環境で) 大幅に高速化・低コスト化するオープンソースライブラリ。ローカル LLM コミュニティの標準ファインチューニングツール。
eli14.es: Una biblioteca de código abierto que hace el fine-tuning de LLMs mucho más rápido y barato, especialmente en una sola GPU. El kit de fine-tuning por defecto para la comunidad de LLMs locales.
eli14.fil: Open-source library na ginagawang mas mabilis at mas mura ang fine-tuning ng LLMs, lalo na sa single GPU. Ang default na fine-tuning toolkit para sa local-LLM community.

why.en: Unsloth is a constant-coverage daily-update topic — its release cadence is the operative pulse of the local-LLM-for-daily-use leg of User Prediction 2.
why.ja: Unsloth はデイリーアップデートの常時カバー対象 — そのリリース頻度が User Prediction 2「日常用途はローカル LLM」軸の実運用上の脈拍。
why.es: Unsloth es un tema de cobertura constante en la actualización diaria — su cadencia de lanzamientos es el pulso operativo de la pata 'LLM local para uso diario' de la User Prediction 2.
why.fil: Constant-coverage topic ang Unsloth sa daily update — ang release cadence nito ay operative pulse ng local-LLM-for-daily-use leg ng User Prediction 2.

terms.one_liner_eli14: Google Cloud's managed platform for AI models and agents — the place to call Gemini, host your own model, or build agents on top of Google infrastructure.
terms.why_it_matters: Anthropic shipping Opus 4.7 across API + Bedrock + Vertex AI + Foundry is the canonical 'frontier on every cloud' pattern. Vertex AI is Google's leg of that triangle.

eli14.en: Google Cloud's managed platform for AI models and agents — the place to call Gemini, host your own model, or build agents on top of Google infrastructure.
eli14.ja: Google Cloud の AI モデル・エージェント向けマネージド基盤 — Gemini の呼び出し、自前モデルのホスト、Google インフラ上のエージェント構築の窓口。
eli14.es: Plataforma gestionada de Google Cloud para modelos y agentes de IA — el lugar para llamar a Gemini, alojar tu propio modelo o construir agentes sobre la infraestructura de Google.
eli14.fil: Managed platform ng Google Cloud para sa AI models at agents — ang lugar para tumawag sa Gemini, mag-host ng sariling model, o mag-build ng agents sa Google infrastructure.

why.en: Anthropic shipping Opus 4.7 across API + Bedrock + Vertex AI + Foundry is the canonical 'frontier on every cloud' pattern. Vertex AI is Google's leg of that triangle.
why.ja: Anthropic が Opus 4.7 を API + Bedrock + Vertex AI + Foundry で展開しているのが「すべてのクラウドにフロンティア」の定番パターン。Vertex AI はその三角形の Google 側の脚。
why.es: Anthropic publicando Opus 4.7 a través de API + Bedrock + Vertex AI + Foundry es el patrón canónico de 'frontier en cada nube'. Vertex AI es la pata de Google en ese triángulo.
why.fil: Ang pag-deploy ng Anthropic ng Opus 4.7 sa API + Bedrock + Vertex AI + Foundry ang canonical 'frontier on every cloud' pattern. Ang Vertex AI ang Google leg ng triangle na yan.

terms.one_liner_eli14: Comparing this period to the same period one year ago — Q1 2026 vs Q1 2025. Strips out seasonal effects so you see real growth.
terms.why_it_matters: Earnings prints headline YoY revenue and EPS — 'AAPL Q2 +17% YoY' is the comparable that priced the iPhone-17 super-cycle into the May tape.

eli14.en: Comparing this period to the same period one year ago — Q1 2026 vs Q1 2025. Strips out seasonal effects so you see real growth.
eli14.ja: 今期と 1 年前の同期を比較する手法 — 2026 年 Q1 と 2025 年 Q1 を比べる、など。季節要因を除き、真の成長を見せる。
eli14.es: Comparar este periodo con el mismo periodo de hace un año — Q1 2026 vs Q1 2025. Elimina los efectos estacionales para ver el crecimiento real.
eli14.fil: Pagkumpara ng kasalukuyang period sa parehong period isang taon nakaraan — Q1 2026 vs Q1 2025. Tinatanggal ang seasonal effects para makita ang totoong growth.

why.en: Earnings prints headline YoY revenue and EPS — 'AAPL Q2 +17% YoY' is the comparable that priced the iPhone-17 super-cycle into the May tape.
why.ja: 決算発表は YoY の売上と EPS が見出しになる — 「AAPL Q2 売上 YoY +17%」が iPhone 17 スーパーサイクルを 5 月相場に織り込ませた指標。
why.es: Los informes de resultados encabezan con ingresos y EPS YoY — 'AAPL Q2 +17% YoY' es la cifra comparable que metió el supercicilo del iPhone-17 en la cinta de mayo.
why.fil: Sa earnings prints, headline ang YoY revenue at EPS — ang 'AAPL Q2 +17% YoY' ang comparable na nag-pricing sa iPhone-17 super-cycle papasok sa May tape.

terms.one_liner_eli14: A security model that assumes no user, device, or service is automatically trusted — every action is verified, even from inside the network. Never trust, always verify.
terms.why_it_matters: Zero-trust applied to AI agents is the User Prediction 1 thesis. Microsoft Agent 365 and CSA's Identity-as-first-pillar are the operative deployment surface.

eli14.en: A security model that assumes no user, device, or service is automatically trusted — every action is verified, even from inside the network. Never trust, always verify.
eli14.ja: ユーザー・端末・サービスを自動的には信用しないセキュリティモデル — ネットワーク内部からのアクセスでも毎回検証する。「信用するな、常に検証せよ」。
eli14.es: Un modelo de seguridad que asume que ningún usuario, dispositivo o servicio es automáticamente de confianza — cada acción se verifica, incluso desde dentro de la red. Nunca confíes, siempre verifica.
eli14.fil: Security model na walang user, device, o service na automatic na pinagkakatiwalaan — bawat action ay vine-verify, kahit galing sa loob ng network. 'Wag magtiwala, laging i-verify.

why.en: Zero-trust applied to AI agents is the User Prediction 1 thesis. Microsoft Agent 365 and CSA's Identity-as-first-pillar are the operative deployment surface.
why.ja: AI エージェントへの Zero Trust 適用は User Prediction 1 の主張そのもの。Microsoft Agent 365 と CSA の「Identity を Zero Trust の第一の柱に」が実運用の場。
why.es: El zero-trust aplicado a agentes de IA es la tesis de la User Prediction 1. Microsoft Agent 365 y la postura Identity-como-primer-pilar de CSA son la superficie operativa.
why.fil: Ang zero-trust applied sa AI agents ang User Prediction 1 thesis. Microsoft Agent 365 at Identity-as-first-pillar ng CSA ang operative deployment surface.

terms.one_liner_eli14: The scaffolding around an LLM that lets it do real work — the part that handles tool calls, memory, retries, and sandboxing. The model is the engine; the harness is the car.
terms.why_it_matters: Most production agent failures live in the harness, not the model. Whoever owns the harness owns the agent's behavior surface — and its CVE surface.

eli14.en: The scaffolding around an LLM that lets it do real work — the part that handles tool calls, memory, retries, and sandboxing. The model is the engine; the harness is the car.
eli14.ja: LLM が実作業をするために周りに用意する足場 — ツール呼び出し、メモリ、再試行、サンドボックスを処理する部分。モデルがエンジンなら、ハーネスは車そのもの。
eli14.es: El armazón alrededor de un LLM que le permite hacer trabajo real — la parte que gestiona llamadas a herramientas, memoria, reintentos y sandboxing. El modelo es el motor; el harness es el coche.
eli14.fil: Ang scaffolding sa paligid ng LLM para makapag-trabaho talaga — yung parte na humahawak sa tool calls, memory, retries, at sandboxing. Engine ang model; ang harness ang kotse mismo.

why.en: Most production agent failures live in the harness, not the model. Whoever owns the harness owns the agent's behavior surface — and its CVE surface.
why.ja: 本番のエージェント障害の大半はモデルではなくハーネスで起きる。ハーネスを握る者がエージェントの挙動と CVE の表面を握る。
why.es: La mayoría de los fallos de agentes en producción están en el harness, no en el modelo. Quien controla el harness controla la superficie de comportamiento — y la superficie CVE — del agente.
why.fil: Karamihan ng production agent failures ay nasa harness, hindi sa model. Sinumang may control sa harness ang may control sa behavior surface — at CVE surface — ng agent.

terms.one_liner_eli14: AI that takes its own actions in a loop — read a webpage, decide to call a tool, check the result, try again — instead of just answering one question at a time.
terms.why_it_matters: Agentic systems multiply blast radius and value at the same time. Every prediction in the security and capex categories assumes this loop is the next mainstream interface.

eli14.en: AI that takes its own actions in a loop — read a webpage, decide to call a tool, check the result, try again — instead of just answering one question at a time.
eli14.ja: AI が自分で動作を繰り返す形 — Web ページを読み、ツールを呼ぶか判断し、結果を確認し、もう一度試す — 単発の質問応答ではない使い方。
eli14.es: IA que toma sus propias acciones en bucle — leer una página, decidir llamar a una herramienta, comprobar el resultado, reintentar — en lugar de solo responder una pregunta a la vez.
eli14.fil: AI na nakakagawa ng sariling actions sa loop — magbasa ng webpage, magdesisyon kung tatawag ng tool, susuriin ang resulta, susubukan ulit — hindi lang basta sumagot ng isang tanong.

why.en: Agentic systems multiply blast radius and value at the same time. Every prediction in the security and capex categories assumes this loop is the next mainstream interface.
why.ja: エージェント型は被害範囲も価値も同時に大きくする。セキュリティと capex 系の予測はすべて、このループが次のメイン UI になることを前提にしている。
why.es: Los sistemas agénticos amplifican el radio de impacto y el valor a la vez. Cada predicción en seguridad y capex asume que este bucle será la próxima interfaz dominante.
why.fil: Pinapalaki ng agentic systems ang blast radius at value sabay. Lahat ng predictions sa security at capex assume na ang loop na ito ang susunod na mainstream interface.

terms.one_liner_eli14: An open-access preprint server where researchers publish papers before — or instead of — formal peer review. The default frontline for AI research; cited as 'arxiv 2604.XXXXX'.
terms.why_it_matters: Most LLM/agent research lands on arxiv first; the substrate-densification signal in User Prediction 3 reads as 'cluster of arxiv ids in one design surface in one week'.

eli14.en: An open-access preprint server where researchers publish papers before — or instead of — formal peer review. The default frontline for AI research; cited as 'arxiv 2604.XXXXX'.
eli14.ja: 正式なピアレビュー前 (または代わり) に研究者が論文を公開するオープンアクセスのプレプリントサーバー。AI 研究の標準的な最前線で、「arxiv 2604.XXXXX」と引用される。
eli14.es: Un servidor de preprints de acceso abierto donde los investigadores publican artículos antes — o en lugar — de la revisión por pares formal. El frente predeterminado de la investigación en IA; citado como 'arxiv 2604.XXXXX'.
eli14.fil: Open-access preprint server kung saan inilalathala ng mga researcher ang papers bago — o sa halip na — formal peer review. Default na frontline ng AI research; sinasanggunian bilang 'arxiv 2604.XXXXX'.

why.en: Most LLM/agent research lands on arxiv first; the substrate-densification signal in User Prediction 3 reads as 'cluster of arxiv ids in one design surface in one week'.
why.ja: LLM/エージェント研究の多くはまず arxiv に投稿される。User Prediction 3 の基盤密度信号は「同じ設計領域に 1 週間で arxiv ID が群がる」現象として読まれる。
why.es: La mayoría de la investigación sobre LLM/agentes aterriza primero en arxiv; la señal de densificación del sustrato en la User Prediction 3 se lee como 'racimo de IDs de arxiv en una sola superficie de diseño en una sola semana'.
why.fil: Karamihan sa LLM/agent research ay naka-arxiv muna; ang substrate-densification signal sa User Prediction 3 ay binabasa bilang 'cluster ng arxiv ids sa isang design surface sa isang linggo'.

terms.one_liner_eli14: When a company uses its cash to buy back its own shares, removing them from circulation. Each remaining share represents a slightly bigger slice of the company.
terms.why_it_matters: Buyback authorizations signal management's confidence in cash flow. AAPL's $100B buyback alongside $700B Big-Tech AI capex is the cohort signal that capex is underwritten by capital-return capacity.

eli14.en: When a company uses its cash to buy back its own shares, removing them from circulation. Each remaining share represents a slightly bigger slice of the company.
eli14.ja: 会社が自社の現金で自社株を買い戻し、市場から減らすこと。残った 1 株あたりの会社の取り分が少しずつ大きくなる。
eli14.es: Cuando una empresa usa su efectivo para recomprar sus propias acciones, retirándolas de circulación. Cada acción restante representa una porción ligeramente mayor de la empresa.
eli14.fil: Pag ginagamit ng kompanya ang sariling cash para bilhin pabalik ang sariling shares, inaalis sa circulation. Bawat natitirang share ay kaunting mas malaking parte ng kompanya.

why.en: Buyback authorizations signal management's confidence in cash flow. AAPL's $100B buyback alongside $700B Big-Tech AI capex is the cohort signal that capex is underwritten by capital-return capacity.
why.ja: 自社株買いの枠は経営陣の現金創出力への自信を示す。AAPL の 1000 億ドル枠と Big Tech 7000 億ドル AI capex の並びは、capex が資本還元能力で裏打ちされているというコホート信号。
why.es: Las autorizaciones de recompra señalan la confianza de la dirección en el flujo de caja. La recompra de $100B de AAPL junto al capex de IA de $700B de Big Tech es la señal de cohorte de que el capex está respaldado por la capacidad de retorno de capital.
why.fil: Pinapakita ng buyback authorizations ang confidence ng management sa cash flow. Ang $100B buyback ng AAPL kasabay ng $700B Big-Tech AI capex ay cohort signal na ang capex ay backed ng capital-return capacity.

terms.one_liner_eli14: Money a company spends on big things that last (data centers, GPUs) — counted differently than monthly bills.
terms.why_it_matters: Hyperscaler capex tells you how much compute is coming online and where the AI infrastructure bottleneck will be.

eli14.en: Money a company spends on big things that last (data centers, GPUs) — counted differently than monthly bills.
eli14.ja: 会社が長く使う大きなもの (データセンターや GPU) に使うお金。月々の請求書とは会計上分けて扱う。
eli14.es: Dinero que una empresa gasta en cosas grandes que duran (centros de datos, GPUs) — se contabiliza diferente que las facturas mensuales.
eli14.fil: Pera na ginagastos ng kompanya sa malalaking bagay na pangmatagalan (data centers, GPUs) — iba ang accounting kaysa sa monthly bills.

why.en: Hyperscaler capex tells you how much compute is coming online and where the AI infrastructure bottleneck will be.
why.ja: ハイパースケーラの capex を見ると、これからどれだけの計算資源がオンラインになるか、AI インフラのボトルネックがどこに来るかが分かる。
why.es: El capex de los hyperscalers indica cuánto cómputo entrará en línea y dónde estará el cuello de botella de la infraestructura de IA.
why.fil: Sinasabi ng hyperscaler capex kung magkano ang darating na compute online at kung saan magkakaroon ng AI infrastructure bottleneck.

terms.one_liner_eli14: Turning words, sentences, or images into long lists of numbers so you can ask 'which of these are most similar?' — math instead of keyword matching. The fuel of vector search and RAG.
terms.why_it_matters: Embeddings are the bridge between LLMs and your data. Vector DBs as long-context cache layers (4/24 prediction) hinges on embeddings staying cheap and high-quality.

eli14.en: Turning words, sentences, or images into long lists of numbers so you can ask 'which of these are most similar?' — math instead of keyword matching. The fuel of vector search and RAG.
eli14.ja: 単語・文・画像を長い数値ベクトルに変換し、「どれが最も似ているか」を計算で問えるようにする手法 — キーワード一致ではなく数学。ベクトル検索と RAG の燃料。
eli14.es: Convertir palabras, frases o imágenes en largas listas de números para poder preguntar '¿cuáles son los más parecidos?' — matemáticas en vez de coincidencia por palabra clave. El combustible de la búsqueda vectorial y de RAG.
eli14.fil: Pagsasalin ng salita, pangungusap, o imahe sa mahabang listahan ng numero para makapagtanong ng 'alin ang pinakamagkakatulad?' — matematika sa halip na keyword matching. Ang gasolina ng vector search at RAG.

why.en: Embeddings are the bridge between LLMs and your data. Vector DBs as long-context cache layers (4/24 prediction) hinges on embeddings staying cheap and high-quality.
why.ja: エンベディングは LLM と自社データを繋ぐ橋渡し。「長文コンテクストキャッシュ層としてのベクトル DB」(4/24 予測) はエンベディングが安く高品質であり続けることに依存する。
why.es: Los embeddings son el puente entre los LLM y tus datos. La predicción del 4/24 (DBs vectoriales como capas de caché de contexto largo) depende de que los embeddings sigan siendo baratos y de alta calidad.
why.fil: Ang embeddings ang tulay sa pagitan ng LLMs at data mo. Nakasalalay sa pananatiling mura at high-quality ng embeddings ang prediction ng 4/24 (vector DBs bilang long-context cache layers).

terms.one_liner_eli14: Taking an already-trained AI model and giving it extra training on a smaller, focused dataset — so it picks up your task or style without re-training from scratch.
terms.why_it_matters: Fine-tuning + quantization + 1M-context defaults are the trio that drives the local-LLM-for-daily-use leg of User Prediction 2.

eli14.en: Taking an already-trained AI model and giving it extra training on a smaller, focused dataset — so it picks up your task or style without re-training from scratch.
eli14.ja: 学習済みの AI モデルに、より小さく的を絞ったデータで追加学習をさせる手法 — ゼロから再学習せずに、自分の課題やスタイルを覚えさせる。
eli14.es: Tomar un modelo de IA ya entrenado y darle entrenamiento extra con un conjunto de datos más pequeño y específico — para que aprenda tu tarea o estilo sin reentrenar desde cero.
eli14.fil: Pagkuha ng AI model na trained na at bigyan pa ng dagdag na training gamit ang mas maliit at focused na dataset — para matuto ito ng task o style mo nang hindi kailangang i-train muli mula sa simula.

why.en: Fine-tuning + quantization + 1M-context defaults are the trio that drives the local-LLM-for-daily-use leg of User Prediction 2.
why.ja: ファインチューニング + 量子化 + 1M コンテクストの三つ巴が、User Prediction 2 の「日常用途はローカル LLM」軸を駆動する。
why.es: Fine-tuning + cuantización + contexto por defecto de 1M son el trío que impulsa la pata de 'LLM local para uso diario' de la User Prediction 2.
why.fil: Ang fine-tuning + quantization + 1M-context defaults ang trio na nagtutulak sa local-LLM-for-daily-use leg ng User Prediction 2.

terms.one_liner_eli14: The handful of AI companies training the biggest, most capable models — currently Anthropic, OpenAI, Google DeepMind, and a few challengers.
terms.why_it_matters: Frontier-lab pricing, model availability, and DoD posture set the terms every other lab and hyperscaler reacts to.

eli14.en: The handful of AI companies training the biggest, most capable models — currently Anthropic, OpenAI, Google DeepMind, and a few challengers.
eli14.ja: 最大級で最も性能が高いモデルを訓練している少数の AI 企業 — 現在は Anthropic、OpenAI、Google DeepMind と少数の挑戦者。
eli14.es: El puñado de empresas de IA que entrenan los modelos más grandes y capaces — actualmente Anthropic, OpenAI, Google DeepMind y unos pocos retadores.
eli14.fil: Iilang AI companies na nag-train ng pinakamalalaki at pinakamatatalinong models — kasalukuyan ay Anthropic, OpenAI, Google DeepMind, at ilang challengers.

why.en: Frontier-lab pricing, model availability, and DoD posture set the terms every other lab and hyperscaler reacts to.
why.ja: フロンティアラボの値付け・モデル供給・国防省への姿勢が、他のラボやハイパースケーラの行動を規定する。
why.es: Los precios, la disponibilidad de modelos y la postura ante el DoD de los frontier labs marcan las condiciones a las que reaccionan el resto de laboratorios e hyperscalers.
why.fil: Pinapatakbo ng frontier-lab pricing, model availability, at DoD posture ang mga terms na sinusunod ng ibang labs at hyperscalers.

terms.one_liner_eli14: One of the very big cloud companies (AWS, Azure, Google, Meta, Oracle) that runs millions of servers.
terms.why_it_matters: Their capex and AI alliances steer the entire market — frontier-lab pricing, chip availability, regional datacenter buildouts.

eli14.en: One of the very big cloud companies (AWS, Azure, Google, Meta, Oracle) that runs millions of servers.
eli14.ja: 何百万台ものサーバーを動かす超大手クラウド企業 (AWS、Azure、Google、Meta、Oracle) のひとつ。
eli14.es: Una de las muy grandes empresas de la nube (AWS, Azure, Google, Meta, Oracle) que opera millones de servidores.
eli14.fil: Isa sa mga pinakamalalaking cloud companies (AWS, Azure, Google, Meta, Oracle) na may milyun-milyong server.

why.en: Their capex and AI alliances steer the entire market — frontier-lab pricing, chip availability, regional datacenter buildouts.
why.ja: 彼らの capex と AI 提携が市場全体を動かす — フロンティアラボの値付け、チップの供給、地域データセンターの増設。
why.es: Su capex y sus alianzas con laboratorios de IA dirigen todo el mercado — precios de los frontier labs, disponibilidad de chips, despliegues regionales de centros de datos.
why.fil: Ang capex nila at AI alliances ang nagdidikta sa buong market — frontier-lab pricing, chip availability, regional datacenter buildouts.

terms.one_liner_eli14: Running a trained AI model to get answers — as opposed to training, which builds the model. Inference is what costs money every time someone uses your AI app.
terms.why_it_matters: Inference is where 80%+ of AI compute spend lives long-term. Inference-server CVEs, KV-cache compression, and quantization all live downstream of this distinction.

eli14.en: Running a trained AI model to get answers — as opposed to training, which builds the model. Inference is what costs money every time someone uses your AI app.
eli14.ja: 学習済み AI モデルを動かして回答を得る処理 — モデルを作る「訓練」と対をなす。AI アプリが使われるたびにコストが発生するのは推論側。
eli14.es: Ejecutar un modelo de IA ya entrenado para obtener respuestas — frente al entrenamiento, que construye el modelo. La inferencia es lo que cuesta dinero cada vez que alguien usa tu aplicación de IA.
eli14.fil: Pagpapatakbo ng trained AI model para makakuha ng sagot — kabaligtaran ng training, na nagbu-build ng model. Ang inference ang gumagastos tuwing may gumagamit ng AI app mo.

why.en: Inference is where 80%+ of AI compute spend lives long-term. Inference-server CVEs, KV-cache compression, and quantization all live downstream of this distinction.
why.ja: 推論こそ AI 計算費用の長期的な 80% 以上が集中する場所。推論サーバーの CVE、KV-cache 圧縮、量子化はすべてこの区別の下流。
why.es: La inferencia es donde a largo plazo vive más del 80% del gasto en cómputo de IA. Los CVE de servidores de inferencia, la compresión de KV-cache y la cuantización viven aguas abajo de esta distinción.
why.fil: Sa inference nakatira ang 80%+ ng long-term AI compute spend. Ang inference-server CVEs, KV-cache compression, at quantization ay lahat downstream ng distinction na ito.

terms.one_liner_eli14: A prompt that talks an LLM out of its safety rules — getting it to produce content the model is supposed to refuse. The LLM cousin of social engineering.
terms.why_it_matters: Jailbreak resistance + sandboxing + zero-trust together is what enterprises pay for. Anthropic's Project Glasswing 50-org gated channel exists because raw API access has insufficient containment.

eli14.en: A prompt that talks an LLM out of its safety rules — getting it to produce content the model is supposed to refuse. The LLM cousin of social engineering.
eli14.ja: LLM を安全規則から外れるよう説得するプロンプト — モデルが本来拒否すべき内容を出させる手口。LLM 版のソーシャルエンジニアリング。
eli14.es: Un prompt que convence a un LLM de saltarse sus reglas de seguridad — logrando que produzca contenido que el modelo debería rechazar. El primo LLM de la ingeniería social.
eli14.fil: Prompt na hinihikayat ang LLM na lampasan ang safety rules nito — para magproduce ng content na dapat sana'y i-refuse. LLM cousin ng social engineering.

why.en: Jailbreak resistance + sandboxing + zero-trust together is what enterprises pay for. Anthropic's Project Glasswing 50-org gated channel exists because raw API access has insufficient containment.
why.ja: 脱獄耐性 + サンドボックス + Zero Trust の三点こそが企業が対価を払う対象。Anthropic Project Glasswing の 50 組織ゲート付きチャネルは、生 API アクセスでは封じ込めが不十分だから存在する。
why.es: La resistencia al jailbreak + sandboxing + zero-trust juntos es lo que pagan las empresas. El canal con barrera de 50 organizaciones de Project Glasswing de Anthropic existe porque el acceso API en bruto no contiene lo suficiente.
why.fil: Ang jailbreak resistance + sandboxing + zero-trust ang sama-samang binabayaran ng enterprises. Umiiral ang 50-org gated channel ng Project Glasswing ng Anthropic dahil hindi sapat ang containment ng raw API access.

terms.one_liner_eli14: An LLM that runs on your own hardware — laptop, phone, on-prem server — instead of being called via someone else's cloud API. Privacy, cost, and offline capability are the typical drivers.
terms.why_it_matters: Local LLM is the 'daily use' leg of User Prediction 2 — and the topic-coverage spine of news-topics.md (Platform / Embedded / Models / Optimization all key off it). Bonsai-8B at 44 tok/s on iPhone 17 Pro Max is the canonical 2026 viability marker.

eli14.en: An LLM that runs on your own hardware — laptop, phone, on-prem server — instead of being called via someone else's cloud API. Privacy, cost, and offline capability are the typical drivers.
eli14.ja: 自分のハードウェア (ノート PC、スマホ、社内サーバ) で動く LLM — 他社クラウド API を経由しない使い方。プライバシー、コスト、オフライン対応が主な動機。
eli14.es: Un LLM que se ejecuta en tu propio hardware — portátil, móvil, servidor on-prem — en vez de llamarse vía la API cloud de otra persona. Privacidad, coste y capacidad offline son los motores típicos.
eli14.fil: LLM na tumatakbo sa sarili mong hardware — laptop, phone, on-prem server — sa halip na tawagin via cloud API ng iba. Privacy, cost, at offline capability ang typical drivers.

why.en: Local LLM is the 'daily use' leg of User Prediction 2 — and the topic-coverage spine of news-topics.md (Platform / Embedded / Models / Optimization all key off it). Bonsai-8B at 44 tok/s on iPhone 17 Pro Max is the canonical 2026 viability marker.
why.ja: ローカル LLM は User Prediction 2 の「日常用途」軸であり、news-topics.md のトピック構成の背骨 (プラットフォーム / 組み込み / モデル / 最適化はすべてこの軸でぶら下がる)。Bonsai-8B が iPhone 17 Pro Max で 44 tok/s 動作するのが 2026 年の実用性マーカー。
why.es: El LLM local es la pata de 'uso diario' de la User Prediction 2 — y la columna vertebral temática de news-topics.md (Plataforma / Embebido / Modelos / Optimización dependen de él). Bonsai-8B a 44 tok/s en iPhone 17 Pro Max es el marcador canónico de viabilidad en 2026.
why.fil: Ang local LLM ang 'daily use' leg ng User Prediction 2 — at backbone ng topic coverage sa news-topics.md (Platform / Embedded / Models / Optimization ay lahat naka-key dito). Ang Bonsai-8B sa 44 tok/s sa iPhone 17 Pro Max ang canonical 2026 viability marker.

terms.one_liner_eli14: An AI model whose trained parameters can be downloaded and run yourself — versus closed models you only access via someone else's API. Llama, DeepSeek, Qwen, GLM are open-weight.
terms.why_it_matters: Open-weight model quality has caught up enough that User Prediction 2's 'local LLMs for daily use' leg has cohort-scale supply: DeepSeek V4, Qwen 3.6, Kimi K2.6, GLM-5.1.

eli14.en: An AI model whose trained parameters can be downloaded and run yourself — versus closed models you only access via someone else's API. Llama, DeepSeek, Qwen, GLM are open-weight.
eli14.ja: 学習済みパラメータをダウンロードして自分で動かせる AI モデル — 他社 API 経由でしか触れない非公開モデルの対義語。Llama、DeepSeek、Qwen、GLM がオープンウェイト。
eli14.es: Un modelo de IA cuyos parámetros entrenados se pueden descargar y ejecutar uno mismo — frente a modelos cerrados a los que solo se accede vía la API de otra persona. Llama, DeepSeek, Qwen y GLM son open-weight.
eli14.fil: AI model kung saan pwede mong i-download at patakbuhin mismo ang trained parameters — kabaligtaran ng closed models na via API lang ng iba. Open-weight ang Llama, DeepSeek, Qwen, at GLM.

why.en: Open-weight model quality has caught up enough that User Prediction 2's 'local LLMs for daily use' leg has cohort-scale supply: DeepSeek V4, Qwen 3.6, Kimi K2.6, GLM-5.1.
why.ja: オープンウェイトモデルの品質が追いついた結果、User Prediction 2 の「日常用途はローカル LLM」軸はコホート規模の供給を得た: DeepSeek V4、Qwen 3.6、Kimi K2.6、GLM-5.1。
why.es: La calidad de los modelos open-weight ha alcanzado lo suficiente para que la pata 'LLM local para uso diario' de la User Prediction 2 tenga oferta a escala de cohorte: DeepSeek V4, Qwen 3.6, Kimi K2.6, GLM-5.1.
why.fil: Sapat na nahabol ng open-weight model quality kaya may cohort-scale supply na ang 'local LLMs for daily use' leg ng User Prediction 2: DeepSeek V4, Qwen 3.6, Kimi K2.6, GLM-5.1.

terms.one_liner_eli14: The text you give an LLM to set the task — instructions, examples, the actual question. The 'system prompt' is the hidden instructions a product layers on top of yours.
terms.why_it_matters: Prompts are the new programming surface — and the new attack surface. Both User Prediction 1's threat model and the Mythos red-team success story live here.

eli14.en: The text you give an LLM to set the task — instructions, examples, the actual question. The 'system prompt' is the hidden instructions a product layers on top of yours.
eli14.ja: LLM に課題を伝えるために与えるテキスト — 指示、例、実際の質問。「システムプロンプト」は、製品があなたの入力の上に重ねる隠れた指示文。
eli14.es: El texto que le das a un LLM para fijar la tarea — instrucciones, ejemplos, la pregunta real. El 'system prompt' son las instrucciones ocultas que un producto pone sobre las tuyas.
eli14.fil: Ang text na binibigay mo sa LLM para i-set ang task — instructions, examples, mismong tanong. Ang 'system prompt' ay yung nakatagong instructions na nilalapatan ng product sa ibabaw ng sa'yo.

why.en: Prompts are the new programming surface — and the new attack surface. Both User Prediction 1's threat model and the Mythos red-team success story live here.
why.ja: プロンプトは新たなプログラミング面 — そして新たな攻撃面。User Prediction 1 の脅威モデルも Mythos のレッドチーム成功例も、ここで起きている。
why.es: Los prompts son la nueva superficie de programación — y la nueva superficie de ataque. Tanto el modelo de amenaza de la User Prediction 1 como el éxito de red-team de Mythos viven aquí.
why.fil: Ang prompts ang bagong programming surface — at bagong attack surface. Dito nakatira ang threat model ng User Prediction 1 at ang Mythos red-team success story.

terms.one_liner_eli14: When an LLM stores the work it did on a long shared instructions block, so the next call reuses it instead of re-computing — way cheaper and faster.
terms.why_it_matters: Prompt caching turns 'long context' from a cost problem into a cost advantage. Anthropic, Google, and OpenAI all expose it; per-token-margin disclosures will hinge on it.

eli14.en: When an LLM stores the work it did on a long shared instructions block, so the next call reuses it instead of re-computing — way cheaper and faster.
eli14.ja: LLM が長い共有指示ブロックの計算結果を保存し、次の呼び出しで再計算せず再利用する仕組み — 大幅に安く・速くなる。
eli14.es: Cuando un LLM guarda el trabajo hecho sobre un bloque largo de instrucciones compartidas, para que la siguiente llamada lo reutilice en lugar de recalcularlo — mucho más barato y rápido.
eli14.fil: Pag ini-store ng LLM ang ginawang computation sa mahabang shared instructions block, para gamitin muli ng susunod na call sa halip na i-compute ulit — mas mura at mabilis.

why.en: Prompt caching turns 'long context' from a cost problem into a cost advantage. Anthropic, Google, and OpenAI all expose it; per-token-margin disclosures will hinge on it.
why.ja: プロンプトキャッシュは「長文コンテクスト」をコスト負担からコスト優位に変える。Anthropic、Google、OpenAI のいずれも提供しており、トークン単価マージンの開示はこれに左右される。
why.es: El prompt caching convierte el 'contexto largo' de problema de coste en ventaja de coste. Anthropic, Google y OpenAI lo exponen; la divulgación de margen por token dependerá de esto.
why.fil: Pinapaging cost-advantage ng prompt caching ang dating cost-problem na 'long context'. Inalok ito ng Anthropic, Google, at OpenAI; ang per-token-margin disclosures ay nakasalalay dito.

terms.one_liner_eli14: An attack where text from a webpage, email, or document tricks an AI into ignoring its real instructions and following the attacker's instead. The XSS of the LLM era.
terms.why_it_matters: Prompt injection is named in ATT&CK v19 as 'context poisoning' — the technique that elevated the agentic-AI threat class into a CNA-issued sub-corpus.

eli14.en: An attack where text from a webpage, email, or document tricks an AI into ignoring its real instructions and following the attacker's instead. The XSS of the LLM era.
eli14.ja: Web ページ・メール・文書中のテキストが AI を騙して、本来の指示を無視し攻撃者の指示に従わせる攻撃。LLM 時代の XSS。
eli14.es: Un ataque en el que el texto de una página web, correo o documento engaña a una IA para que ignore sus instrucciones reales y siga las del atacante. El XSS de la era LLM.
eli14.fil: Atake kung saan dinadaya ng text mula sa webpage, email, o document ang AI para hindi sundin ang totoong instructions nito at sundin yung sa attacker. Ang XSS ng LLM era.

why.en: Prompt injection is named in ATT&CK v19 as 'context poisoning' — the technique that elevated the agentic-AI threat class into a CNA-issued sub-corpus.
why.ja: プロンプトインジェクションは ATT&CK v19 で「context poisoning」として命名され、エージェント AI の脅威クラスを CNA 発行のサブコーパスに引き上げた手法。
why.es: La inyección de prompts está nombrada en ATT&CK v19 como 'context poisoning' — la técnica que elevó la clase de amenaza de IA agéntica a un subcorpus emitido por una CNA.
why.fil: Ang prompt injection ay pinangalanan sa ATT&CK v19 na 'context poisoning' — ang technique na nagpaakyat sa agentic-AI threat class para maging CNA-issued sub-corpus.

terms.one_liner_eli14: Shrinking an AI model by storing each number with fewer bits — like saving a photo as JPEG instead of raw RAW. Loses a tiny bit of accuracy, gains a lot of speed and memory.
terms.why_it_matters: Quantization (TurboQuant, GPTQ, AWQ, FP8, 1-bit) is what makes local LLMs viable on consumer hardware. Where the inference-cost curve actually moves.

eli14.en: Shrinking an AI model by storing each number with fewer bits — like saving a photo as JPEG instead of raw RAW. Loses a tiny bit of accuracy, gains a lot of speed and memory.
eli14.ja: AI モデルの各数値をより少ないビット数で保持してサイズを縮める手法 — 写真を RAW でなく JPEG で保存するイメージ。少しの精度損失と引き換えに大きな速度・メモリ改善が得られる。
eli14.es: Encoger un modelo de IA almacenando cada número con menos bits — como guardar una foto en JPEG en vez de RAW. Pierdes un poco de precisión, ganas mucha velocidad y memoria.
eli14.fil: Pagliit sa AI model sa pamamagitan ng pag-store sa bawat numero gamit ang mas kaunting bits — parang pag-save ng photo bilang JPEG sa halip na RAW. Konting accuracy ang nawawala, malaking speed at memory ang napapala.

why.en: Quantization (TurboQuant, GPTQ, AWQ, FP8, 1-bit) is what makes local LLMs viable on consumer hardware. Where the inference-cost curve actually moves.
why.ja: 量子化 (TurboQuant、GPTQ、AWQ、FP8、1-bit) こそがローカル LLM をコンシューマ向けハードで成立させる鍵。推論コスト曲線が実際に動く場所。
