why.es: La cuantización (TurboQuant, GPTQ, AWQ, FP8, 1-bit) es lo que hace viables los LLMs locales en hardware de consumo. Donde la curva de coste de inferencia se mueve realmente.
why.fil: Ang quantization (TurboQuant, GPTQ, AWQ, FP8, 1-bit) ang nagpapaposible sa local LLMs sa consumer hardware. Dito talaga gumagalaw ang inference-cost curve.

terms.one_liner_eli14: A security team whose job is to attack their own systems before real attackers do. AI red teams use LLMs to find bugs, jailbreaks, and unsafe outputs at scale.
terms.why_it_matters: Autonomous red-teaming is the operative case-study for User Prediction 1 (zero-trust era) and User Prediction 3 (RL-trained agents) — Mythos Preview is the visible example.

eli14.en: A security team whose job is to attack their own systems before real attackers do. AI red teams use LLMs to find bugs, jailbreaks, and unsafe outputs at scale.
eli14.ja: 実際の攻撃者より先に自社システムを攻撃するのが仕事のセキュリティチーム。AI レッドチームは LLM を使ってバグ・脱獄・安全でない出力を大規模に発見する。
eli14.es: Un equipo de seguridad cuya misión es atacar sus propios sistemas antes que los atacantes reales. Los red teams de IA usan LLMs para encontrar bugs, jailbreaks y salidas inseguras a escala.
eli14.fil: Security team na ang trabaho ay atakihin ang sariling system nila bago gawin ng totoong attackers. Ang AI red teams ay gumagamit ng LLMs para makahanap ng bugs, jailbreaks, at unsafe outputs sa scale.

why.en: Autonomous red-teaming is the operative case-study for User Prediction 1 (zero-trust era) and User Prediction 3 (RL-trained agents) — Mythos Preview is the visible example.
why.ja: 自律レッドチームは User Prediction 1 (Zero Trust 時代) と User Prediction 3 (RL 訓練エージェント) 双方の運用ケーススタディ — Mythos Preview がその可視例。
why.es: El red-teaming autónomo es el caso operativo de la User Prediction 1 (era zero-trust) y de la User Prediction 3 (agentes entrenados por RL) — Mythos Preview es el ejemplo visible.
why.fil: Ang autonomous red-teaming ang operative case-study para sa User Prediction 1 (zero-trust era) at User Prediction 3 (RL-trained agents) — Mythos Preview ang visible example.

terms.one_liner_eli14: The smallest unit an LLM reads and writes — usually 3-4 characters or part of a word. 'unbelievable' might be 3 tokens. Pricing and context limits are counted in tokens.
terms.why_it_matters: Per-token pricing is the unit that frontier labs and hyperscalers compete on. The capex-vs-margin debate translates to per-token economics.

eli14.en: The smallest unit an LLM reads and writes — usually 3-4 characters or part of a word. 'unbelievable' might be 3 tokens. Pricing and context limits are counted in tokens.
eli14.ja: LLM が読み書きする最小単位 — 通常 3-4 文字または単語の一部。「unbelievable」が 3 トークンになるイメージ。料金とコンテキスト上限はトークン単位で数える。
eli14.es: La unidad más pequeña que un LLM lee y escribe — generalmente de 3 a 4 caracteres o parte de una palabra. 'unbelievable' podría ser 3 tokens. El precio y los límites de contexto se cuentan en tokens.
eli14.fil: Pinakamaliit na unit na binabasa at sinusulat ng LLM — kadalasan 3-4 characters o bahagi ng salita. Maaaring 3 tokens ang 'unbelievable'. Sa tokens binibilang ang pricing at context limits.

why.en: Per-token pricing is the unit that frontier labs and hyperscalers compete on. The capex-vs-margin debate translates to per-token economics.
why.ja: トークン単価こそがフロンティアラボとハイパースケーラの競争軸。capex vs マージン議論はトークン単価の経済に翻訳される。
why.es: El precio por token es la unidad sobre la que compiten frontier labs e hyperscalers. El debate capex-vs-margen se traduce en economía por token.
why.fil: Per-token pricing ang unit na pinaglalabanan ng frontier labs at hyperscalers. Ang capex-vs-margin debate ay nagiging per-token economics.

terms.one_liner_eli14: When an LLM, instead of answering with text, calls a function — search the web, run code, query a database — and feeds the result back into its reasoning.
terms.why_it_matters: Tool use is the primitive that turns an LLM into an agent. Tool-call audit logs are the operative observability surface that Microsoft Agent 365 ships.

eli14.en: When an LLM, instead of answering with text, calls a function — search the web, run code, query a database — and feeds the result back into its reasoning.
eli14.ja: LLM が回答をテキストで返す代わりに、関数を呼び出し — Web 検索、コード実行、DB クエリ — その結果を自分の推論に取り込む仕組み。
eli14.es: Cuando un LLM, en vez de responder con texto, llama a una función — buscar en la web, ejecutar código, consultar una base de datos — y vuelve a meter el resultado en su razonamiento.
eli14.fil: Pag tumatawag ng function ang LLM (search sa web, mag-run ng code, mag-query ng database) sa halip na sumagot ng text, at ibabalik ang resulta sa sariling reasoning niya.

why.en: Tool use is the primitive that turns an LLM into an agent. Tool-call audit logs are the operative observability surface that Microsoft Agent 365 ships.
why.ja: ツール使用は LLM をエージェントに変えるプリミティブ。ツール呼び出しの監査ログこそが、Microsoft Agent 365 が出荷する可観測性の場。
why.es: El uso de herramientas es la primitiva que convierte un LLM en un agente. Los logs de auditoría de tool-calls son la superficie de observabilidad operativa que entrega Microsoft Agent 365.
why.fil: Ang tool use ang primitive na nagpapagiging agent sa LLM. Ang tool-call audit logs ang operative observability surface na ipinapadala ng Microsoft Agent 365.

terms.one_liner_eli14: The neural-network design behind every modern LLM — invented by Google in 2017 and now powering GPT, Claude, Gemini, and friends. The 'T' in 'GPT'.
terms.why_it_matters: Every assumption in the AI capex thesis — KV-cache compression, attention scaling, quantization — is downstream of how transformers compute. New architectures (Mamba, RWKV) remain niche.

eli14.en: The neural-network design behind every modern LLM — invented by Google in 2017 and now powering GPT, Claude, Gemini, and friends. The 'T' in 'GPT'.
eli14.ja: 現代の LLM すべての土台となるニューラルネット設計 — 2017 年に Google が発表し、GPT、Claude、Gemini などを動かしている。「GPT」の「T」。
eli14.es: El diseño de red neuronal detrás de todo LLM moderno — inventado por Google en 2017 y hoy impulsa GPT, Claude, Gemini y compañía. La 'T' de 'GPT'.
eli14.fil: Ang neural-network design sa likod ng bawat modernong LLM — inimbento ng Google noong 2017 at ngayon ay nagpapagana sa GPT, Claude, Gemini, atbp. Ang 'T' sa 'GPT'.

why.en: Every assumption in the AI capex thesis — KV-cache compression, attention scaling, quantization — is downstream of how transformers compute. New architectures (Mamba, RWKV) remain niche.
why.ja: AI capex テーゼのすべての前提 — KV-cache 圧縮、アテンション・スケーリング、量子化 — はトランスフォーマーがどう計算するかの下流。新アーキテクチャ (Mamba、RWKV) はニッチに留まる。
why.es: Cada supuesto de la tesis del capex de IA — compresión de KV-cache, escalado de atención, cuantización — vive aguas abajo de cómo computa el transformer. Las nuevas arquitecturas (Mamba, RWKV) siguen siendo nicho.
why.fil: Lahat ng assumption sa AI capex thesis — KV-cache compression, attention scaling, quantization — ay downstream ng kung paano nagkalkula ang transformers. Niche pa rin ang bagong architectures (Mamba, RWKV).

terms.one_liner_eli14: An open-source server that runs large language models efficiently — does the heavy lifting between an app and the GPU. Widely used by enterprises self-hosting LLMs.
terms.why_it_matters: Inference-server-as-primitive-supply-chain thesis: vLLM CVEs propagate to every enterprise running it. The control plane for cost and latency on private deployments.

eli14.en: An open-source server that runs large language models efficiently — does the heavy lifting between an app and the GPU. Widely used by enterprises self-hosting LLMs.
eli14.ja: 大規模言語モデルを効率よく実行するオープンソースサーバー。アプリと GPU の間の重い処理を引き受ける。LLM を自社運用する企業に広く使われている。
eli14.es: Un servidor de código abierto que ejecuta modelos de lenguaje grandes de forma eficiente — hace el trabajo pesado entre una aplicación y la GPU. Muy usado por empresas que se autoalojan los LLMs.
eli14.fil: Open-source server na efficient na nagpapatakbo ng large language models — siya ang gumagawa ng heavy work sa pagitan ng app at GPU. Ginagamit ng maraming enterprises na self-hosting ng LLMs.

why.en: Inference-server-as-primitive-supply-chain thesis: vLLM CVEs propagate to every enterprise running it. The control plane for cost and latency on private deployments.
why.ja: 「推論サーバーがプリミティブなサプライチェーン」というテーゼの中心。vLLM の CVE は使っている全企業に波及する。プライベート配備でのコストとレイテンシの操縦盤。
why.es: Tesis del servidor de inferencia como cadena de suministro primitiva: los CVE de vLLM se propagan a cada empresa que lo ejecuta. El plano de control de coste y latencia en despliegues privados.
why.fil: Inference-server-as-primitive-supply-chain thesis: pagdating ng vLLM CVE, kumakalat ito sa lahat ng enterprise na gumagamit. Ito ang control plane para sa cost at latency sa private deployments.

terms.one_liner_eli14: A bug attackers know about and exploit before the vendor has had a chance to fix it — patch is on day zero of public knowledge. The most expensive bug class on the underground market.
terms.why_it_matters: Anthropic Mythos Preview's 'thousands of zero-day vulnerabilities' discovered via autonomous red-teaming reframes the zero-day economy itself — supply now produced at industrial scale.

eli14.en: A bug attackers know about and exploit before the vendor has had a chance to fix it — patch is on day zero of public knowledge. The most expensive bug class on the underground market.
eli14.ja: ベンダーが修正できる前から攻撃者が知り悪用しているバグ — 公開初日 (day 0) には既にパッチが無い状態。地下市場で最も高値のバグ種類。
eli14.es: Un bug que los atacantes conocen y explotan antes de que el proveedor haya tenido oportunidad de parchearlo — el parche está en el día cero del conocimiento público. La clase de bug más cara en el mercado clandestino.
eli14.fil: Bug na alam at ginagamit na ng attackers bago pa nagagawa ng vendor ang patch — wala pang patch sa unang araw (day zero) na nalalaman ito. Pinakamahal na klase ng bug sa underground market.

why.en: Anthropic Mythos Preview's 'thousands of zero-day vulnerabilities' discovered via autonomous red-teaming reframes the zero-day economy itself — supply now produced at industrial scale.
why.ja: Anthropic Mythos Preview が自律レッドチームで発見した「数千件のゼロデイ」は、ゼロデイ経済そのものを再定義する — 供給が産業規模で生産されるようになった。
why.es: Los 'miles de vulnerabilidades zero-day' descubiertas por el red-team autónomo de Anthropic Mythos Preview reformulan la propia economía del zero-day — la oferta ahora se produce a escala industrial.
why.fil: Binabago ng 'thousands of zero-day vulnerabilities' na natuklasan ng autonomous red-teaming ng Anthropic Mythos Preview ang mismong zero-day economy — sa industrial scale na ang supply.
